heading: Waiver authorities

notes: Delegation of FunctionsFor delegation of functions of President under this section, see Ex. Ord. No. 12163, , 44 F.R. 56673, as amended, set out as a note under .Sept. 29, 1979section 2381 of this title

children.heading: Efficient and timely completion of authorized construction
children.label: a Efficient and timely completion of authorized construction
children.text: It is the sense of the Congress that the President should take all necessary measures consistent with law to insure the efficient and timely completion of the construction authorized by this part, including the exercise of authority vested in him by .section 2393(a) of this title

children.heading: Use of funds to pay for personal services abroad
children.label: b Use of funds to pay for personal services abroad
children.text: The provisions of paragraph (3) of shall be applicable to the use of funds available to carry out this part, except that no more than sixty persons may be engaged at any one time under that paragraph for purposes of this part.section 2396(a) of this title
